prompt:
Use case: logo-brand
Asset type: focused third-round product logo mascot exploration for CopayGuard
Primary request: a pill-shaped mascot defending itself with an oversized shield
Subject: one tasteful pill-shaped animated character, gray body, small simple face, holding a much larger shield with its left hand; the shield is bigger than the character and is pushed forward like a defensive block
Style/medium: polished 2D animated mascot logo, vector-friendly, bold clean geometry, thick charcoal outlines, modern healthcare-fintech startup brand, friendly but protective
Composition/framing: centered, shield dominates the composition and covers about 60-70 percent of the character, pill peeks out from behind the shield, left-hand grip visibly holding the shield, defensive stance, full mascot visible, generous padding, app-icon-ready
Scene/backdrop: plain warm off-white or very light gray background, no environment
Color palette: graphite gray, charcoal, soft silver gray, warm safety orange, muted amber, off-white; orange is the shield accent and key protection/check detail; no teal, blue, green, purple, or red
Text (verbatim): none
Constraints: no written text, no letters, no watermark, no photorealism, no busy background, no red cross branding, shield must be larger than the character, shield must look like it is defending the pill
Avoid: scary, aggressive weapon, childish toy, hospital logo clone, cluttered details, fake text, tiny symbols that disappear at icon size
Variation: front-facing pill peeking over the left edge of a large orange-and-gray shield, calm confident smile, shield angled slightly toward viewer with a bold check mark.
